goal: Move JobSentinel toward v2.9.0 readiness for an urgent single-user job search while preserving privacy, source boundaries, non-technical usability, verified dependencies, downloadable Agent Skills, and the locked Quiet Shield redesign in DESIGN.md, docs/design/README.md, and docs/design/design-spec.md.

activeWorkstreams.nextStep: Do not push, tag, publish, or upload until the user confirms; rerun final local gates after any further local change.
